input.command:
curl -s "https://public.zapper.xyz/graphql" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "x-zapper-api-key: 06112e77-d5df-4c51-8f86-707bc1a842c0" \
  -d '{"query":"query Portfolio($addresses: [Address!]!) { portfolio(addresses: $addresses) { totals { total } tokenBalances { token { baseToken { name symbol address imgUrl network } balance balanceUSD } } } }", "variables": {"addresses": ["0xf7b0d4f8e0c8b5a4e3d2c1b0a9f8e7d6c5b4a3b2"]}}' 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys, json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); print('Has data:', 'data' in data); print('Has errors:', 'errors' in data); print(json.dumps(data, indent=2)[:500])"
